## Build & Test Commands

**github_actions:**
- `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- `cargo build --workspace`
- `cargo test --workspace`
- `cargo install cross --git https://github.com/cross-rs/cross`
- `cargo build --release --target ${{ matrix.target }} -p homer-cli`
- `cross build --release --target ${{ matrix.target }} -p homer-cli`

## Architecture Overview

The codebase organizes into 32 architectural clusters:

- **Language Support** (19 files): `homer-graphs/src/scope_graph.rs`, `homer-graphs/src/languages/fallback.rs`, `homer-graphs/src/languages/java.rs`, `homer-graphs/src/languages/ecma_scope.rs`, `homer-graphs/src/import_graph.rs`
- **Output Rendering** (13 files): `homer-cli/src/commands/status.rs`, `homer-core/src/contracts.rs`, `homer-core/src/config.rs`, `homer-core/src/types.rs`, `homer-core/src/store/traits.rs`
- **Data Extraction** (12 files): `homer-core/src/error.rs`, `homer-core/src/store/sqlite.rs`, `homer-core/src/render/risk_map.rs`, `homer-core/src/extract/prompt.rs`, `homer-core/src/extract/git.rs`
- **CLI Commands** (11 files): `homer-cli/src/commands/render.rs`, `homer-core/src/store/mod.rs`, `homer-cli/src/commands/serve.rs`, `homer-cli/src/commands/risk_check.rs`, `homer-cli/src/commands/snapshot.rs`
- **Analysis Engine** (8 files): `homer-core/src/store/incremental.rs`, `homer-core/src/render/agents_md.rs`, `homer-core/src/analyze/behavioral.rs`, `homer-core/src/analyze/traits.rs`, `homer-core/src/analyze/task_pattern.rs`
- **LLM Integration** (4 files): `homer-core/src/analyze/semantic.rs`, `homer-core/src/llm/mod.rs`, `homer-core/src/llm/cache.rs`, `homer-core/src/analyze/mod.rs`
- **Src** (3 files): `homer-core/src/pipeline.rs`, `homer-core/src/progress.rs`, `homer-core/src/llm/providers.rs`
- **MCP Server** (3 files): `homer-spec/ARCHITECTURE.md`, `homer-mcp/src/lib.rs`, `homer-graphs/src/languages/mod.rs`
- **Homer Spec** (3 files): `homer-core/tests/perf_regression.rs`, `homer-spec/ANALYZERS.md`, `homer-spec/EXTRACTORS.md`
- **Benches** (3 files): `homer-core/benches/parse_bench.rs`, `homer-core/benches/centrality_bench.rs`, `homer-core/benches/store_bench.rs`
- **Graph Engine** (2 files): `homer-graphs/src/diff.rs`, `homer-graphs/src/lib.rs`
- **Test Suite** (2 files): `homer-test/tests/pipeline.rs`, `homer-test/src/lib.rs`
- **Storage Layer** (1 files): `homer-core/src/store/schema.rs`
